explanation: The original command line is already a valid test case and does not require mutation.
Replaces the encoded command with a clear-text command to simulate the same behavior, using quotes for safe insertion.
Uses short forms of the flags (-Ex for -ExecutionPolicy, -Win for -WindowStyle) and quotes for safe insertion.
Reorders the flags while preserving the same behavior and uses quotes for safe insertion.
Adds an additional empty -Command flag to test how the parser handles multiple -Command arguments.
Adds an escaped quote at the end to test how the parser handles trailing quotes.
